lens: Shapes the lab as a portfolio of bold but coherent bets, forcing clarity on which directions deserve concentrated effort.
background: A field-defining PI with rare range across strategy, technical depth, and team building, known for setting agendas that other groups eventually follow.
notable_results: Led multiple landmark research programs to top-tier publications | Mentored researchers into premier fellowships and faculty roles | Built a research platform adopted across academia and industry

lens: Drives toward durable research frameworks, insisting each project strengthens the lab's long-term intellectual core.
background: A deeply technical research leader who couples first-principles rigor with strong taste for scalable agendas rather than isolated wins.
notable_results: Introduced a methodological framework that influenced an entire subfield | Guided several papers to oral or spotlight recognition | Built a lab culture known for unusually strong theory-to-system integration

lens: Draws out the strongest version of each perspective, then synthesizes conflict into focused decisions the whole team can execute on.
background: A highly respected mentor and research lead who turns groups of strong-willed experts into unusually effective collaborative teams without diluting standards.
notable_results: Known for mentoring multi-author papers to top outcomes | Built collaborations spanning academia and industry labs | Repeatedly recognized for developing exceptional junior researchers

lens: Allocates attention, compute, and people ruthlessly so the lab compounds advantage instead of spreading effort too thin.
background: A high-agency research director with strong systems and product instincts, excellent at balancing ambitious ideas with execution pressure and resource realism.
notable_results: Scaled a research organization through multiple successful project cycles | Converted exploratory work into high-impact deployments and publications | Established evaluation and execution practices copied by peer teams
